title: Taarini
desc: Kedar blames himself for his mother's death, but Taarini comforts him. Meanwhile, the office VCR goes missing, which makes Dayanand nervous.

title: Sanai Chaughade
desc: Weighed down by his past, Jay rejects the idea of love. But Sharvari comes into his life and destiny ignites a conflict of beliefs, compelling them to explore if they can mend past scars with love.

title: Mazhi Tuzhi Reshimgaath
desc: Yash, a rich businessman, seeks true love. When he falls in love with Neha, a beautiful woman, he faces trouble winning her over.

desc: Ajinkya, an aspiring soldier, finds his life complicated by his romantic feelings for a free-spirited woman named Sheetal.

title: Shubh Shravani
desc: Growing up wealthy, Shravanii craves her father's love. Her clash with modest Shubh sparks a bond that transcends status and riches.

title: Veen Doghantali Hi Tutena
desc: Samar, a wealthy tycoon, and Swanandi, a young middle-class professional, enter a marriage of convenience. However, their contractual nuptials gradually evolve into a profound connection.

title: Kamli Ishq Di
desc: Lucky insists that Mahi publicly announce her engagement to him, while his informant attempts to trap Vicky. Afterwards, Lucky insists on talking to Mahi’s parents regarding his engagement.

title: Savlayachi Janu Savali
desc: A woman with a dusky complexion and a melodious voice faces various obstacles. Her life gets entangled with a man whose mother wants a beautiful bride for him.

desc: Shravani hides a longing for love and her father's approval beneath her luxury. Her clash with Shubh's life sparks a bond that goes beyond money and status.
